title: WobblyHearts
description: Lose a heart on death, get one upon eating an Enchanted Golden Apple!
body:
[![OTHER PROJECTS](https://img.shields.io/badge/DATAPACK%20ONLY-00af5c?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&labelColor=gray)](https://modrinth.com/user/Kyrianow) [![DISCORD](https://img.shields.io/badge/MORE%20HELP/BUG%20OR%20OTHERS-5865f2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&labelColor=gray)](https://discord.gg/qabbadeptc) # WobblyHearts **WobblyHearts** is a **datapack** based on hearts management with a simple concept:
- You **lose** a **heart** on **death**, and **get one** upon eating an **Enchanted Golden Apple**. - Once you have no more hearts, you get **banned**.
Example video
## Craft There is a **custom craft** for the **Enchanted Golden Apple** as seen below. > Also shown in the recipe book in-game. ![Enchanted Golden Apple craft](https://github.com/Kyrianow/WobblyHearts/assets/140896938/bf005321-260a-49a9-a80c-e06d16b258dd) ## How to update Simply **delete** the **WobblyHearts.zip** and **replace** it with the **new** one!
